examples.name: Synthetic control set
examples.blurb: Generic Qt Designer fixtures covering standard widgets, resources, and custom Y* controls.

examples.name: Form controls
examples.blurb: A dense form: line edits, spin boxes, slider, progress, combo, checkboxes, radios and a button box.

examples.name: Layouts
examples.blurb: Tabbed grid and splitter layouts with group boxes, separator lines, spacers and a tool-button row.

examples.name: Custom widgets
examples.blurb: The custom-widget preset in action: colour ring, hue/gradient/opacity bars, angle dial, centre selector, lists and trees.
